folio.label: 31v
folio.l: Now lord haue reuthe , vp on my sorwes sore

note.notetxt: 1561 s notice the double ascenders on the stem.ODR

folio.l: ñeue me the victorie , I aske the nomore
¢ The prayer stynt of Arcita the strong
The rynges of the temple dore , æat hong
And eke the dores , clateren ful faste
Of whicú Arcita , som what hi~ a gaste
The fires brent , vp on the auter brygút
That it gan , al the temple for to ligút
A Swete Smel , a non , æe ground vp ©aue
And Arcita a non , his hand vp haue
And more encens , in to the fyr he cast
With othere ri©tes mo , and at the last
¢ The statute of Mars , bygan his hauberk rynge
And with æ Soun , he herd a måmurynge
Ful lowe and dym , and seide thus , victorie
For whicú , he ©af to Mars , honoå and glorie
¢ And thus with ioye , and hope wel to fare
Arcite a non , vn to his In is fare
As fayn as foul , is of the brygút Sonne
And rigút a non , swicú a strif , æäe is bygonne
For thilke guntyng , in æe heuene a boue
Betwix venus , the goddesse of loue
And Mars , the sterne god armypotent
That Iubit ä was besy , it to stent
Til æ the pale , Saturnus , the colde
That knew so manye , of auentures olde
Fond in his old ex¹ience , and art
That the ful sone , hatú plesed euäy part
¢ As soth is seid , elde hath gret auauntage
In elde is bothe wysdom , and vsage
Men may the olde at renne , and nat at rede
Saturne a non , to stynten stryf and drede
Al be it , æat it is , a geyn his kynde
Of al this strif , he can remedye fynde
¢ My dere doughter venus , q¶ Saturne
My cours , that hatú so wyde , for to turne
Hath more powere , than wot ony man
Myn is the drenchyng , in the see so wan
Myn is the prysou~ , in the derke Cote
Myn is the strangelyng , & hangyng by the throte
The murmur , and the cherles rebellyng
The groynyng , and the pryue enpoysenyng
I do vengeaunce , and pleyn correccou~
While I dwelle in æe signe of the lyou~
Myn is the ruyne , of the heye halles
